<!------------------------------------------->
<!--- Detalhamento Função Github Document --->
<!------------------------------------------->
:::{.content-visible when-format = 'gfm'}
```r
bacen_query (bacen_series_code, bacen_series_name, start_date, end_date, source_github = TRUE)
```
:::
  
<!------------------------------->
<!--- Detalhamento Função PDF --->
<!------------------------------->
:::{.content-visible when-format = 'pdf'}
\begin{functioncard}
\texttt{$\textbf{bacen\_query} (bacen\_series\_code, bacen\_series\_name, start\_date, end\_date, source\_github)$}
\end{functioncard}
:::
  
<!-------------------------------->
<!--- Detalhamento Função HTML --->
<!-------------------------------->
:::{.content-visible when-format = 'html'}
<div class = 'function_card'> 
bacen_query (bacen_series_code, bacen_series_name, start_date, end_date, source_github = TRUE)
</div>
:::
